query: SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.establishmentId, o.customerName, o.status, COUNT(oi.id) as itemCount FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.orderId GROUP BY o.id ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 10;
